prompt: Audit the animations in this file and give me a full report on quality, performance issues, and consistency problems.

assertions.text: Output contains a structured audit report table with columns including Issue, Severity, and Fix
Report evaluates all 5 audit dimensions: dependencies, modernity, performance, conflict, consistency
CRITICAL issues are identified (no GSAP loaded, no scroll animations, no reduced-motion guard)
Summary line states count of CRITICAL, WARNING, and INFO items
Concrete Before/After fix patches are provided for CRITICAL and WARNING items
Each fix has a Why explanation sentence
Report identifies that the page has NO animation JavaScript code despite having animation-related CSS classes
